title: Onam Celebration 2026
summary: A vibrant day of pookalam, traditional feast, cultural performances, and family games celebrating Kerala’s harvest festival.

title: Free Medical Camp
summary: General health check-ups, specialist consultations, and awareness sessions organized with partner hospitals.

title: Youth Leadership Fest
summary: Workshops, debates, and team challenges designed to inspire the next generation of community leaders.

title: Annual Sports Meet
summary: Track and field events, indoor games, and friendly matches bringing families together in healthy competition.

title: Blood Donation Drive
summary: Members and neighbours came together to donate blood in partnership with a certified blood bank.

title: Cultural Night
summary: An evening of classical and contemporary performances showcasing talent from across the Samajam.
